description: LinkedIn Talent Solutions API for job search, job details retrieval, company information, and personalized job recommendations.

tools.name: search_jobs
tools.description: Search for job postings on LinkedIn using keywords, location, and employment type filters.

keywords.description: Job title or keywords to search for (e.g., 'Software Engineer', 'Data Analyst').

location.description: Geographic location to filter job results (e.g., 'San Francisco, CA', 'Remote').

job_type.description: Employment type filter. Valid values: FULL_TIME, PART_TIME, CONTRACT, TEMPORARY, INTERNSHIP, VOLUNTEER.

jobs.description: List of job postings matching the search criteria.

job_id.description: The unique identifier for the LinkedIn job posting.

title.description: The job title or position name.

company.description: The name of the hiring company.

location.description: The geographic location of the job.

employment_type.description: The type of employment (e.g., FULL_TIME, PART_TIME, CONTRACT).

posted_date.description: The date when the job was posted, in ISO 8601 format.

url.description: The direct URL to the job posting on LinkedIn.

total_count.description: The total number of job postings found matching the search criteria.

tools.name: get_job_details
tools.description: Retrieve comprehensive details about a specific LinkedIn job posting.

job_id.description: The unique identifier for the LinkedIn job posting.
The unique identifier for the LinkedIn job posting.

title.description: The job title or position name.

company.description: The name of the hiring company.

company_id.description: The unique identifier for the company on LinkedIn.

description.description: The full job description including responsibilities, requirements, and benefits.

location.description: The geographic location of the job.

employment_type.description: The type of employment (e.g., FULL_TIME, PART_TIME, CONTRACT).

experience_level.description: The required experience level (e.g., Entry Level, Mid-Senior Level, Executive).

industries.description: List of industries associated with the job posting.

posted_date.description: The date when the job was posted, in ISO 8601 format.

application_url.description: The URL where candidates can apply for the job.

tools.name: get_company_jobs
tools.description: Retrieve all active job postings from a specific company on LinkedIn.

company_id.description: The unique identifier for the company on LinkedIn.

count.description: The maximum number of job postings to return. Default is 25.

jobs.description: List of active job postings from the company.

job_id.description: The unique identifier for the LinkedIn job posting.

title.description: The job title or position name.

location.description: The geographic location of the job.

posted_date.description: The date when the job was posted, in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: get_recommended_jobs
tools.description: Retrieve personalized job recommendations based on user profile, skills, and preferences.

user_id.description: The unique identifier for the LinkedIn user. If not provided, uses the authenticated user's profile.

jobs.description: List of recommended job postings tailored to the user's profile.

job_id.description: The unique identifier for the LinkedIn job posting.

title.description: The job title or position name.

company.description: The name of the hiring company.

match_score.description: A score between 0.0 and 1.0 indicating how well the job matches the user's profile and preferences.

reason.description: Explanation of why this job was recommended (e.g., 'Matches your skills in Python and Machine Learning').

tools.name: get_company_info
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a company from LinkedIn.

company_id.description: The unique identifier for the company on LinkedIn, or the company name to look up.
The unique identifier for the company on LinkedIn.

name.description: The official name of the company.

description.description: A detailed description of the company's business, mission, and values.

industry.description: The primary industry sector the company operates in.

company_size.description: The size range of the company (e.g., '51-200 employees', '1001-5000 employees').

headquarters.description: The location of the company's headquarters.

follower_count.description: The number of LinkedIn users following the company's page.
